title.raw: Facebook Page Setup for Newcastle Restaurants
title.rendered: Facebook Page Setup for Newcastle Restaurants

content.raw:
Facebook Page Setup for Newcastle Restaurants

Your Facebook page is where locals discover your restaurant, check your menu, read reviews, and decide whether to visit. A properly set up page turns casual scrollers into paying customers.

Why Facebook Still Matters for Restaurants

  • Local discovery — Facebook is still the #1 platform Australians use to find and recommend local restaurants
  • Social proof — reviews, check-ins, and tagged photos build trust faster than any ad
  • Direct ordering — link your Square Online ordering page directly from your Facebook page
  • Event promotion — promote live music nights, special menus, and holiday events to your local audience

What We Set Up

  • Page creation or audit of existing page
  • Business details — name, address, phone, hours, category
  • Call-to-action button linked to your Square Online ordering page
  • Menu tab or link to your online menu
  • Cover photo and profile photo (using your branding assets)
  • About section with keyword-rich description
  • Review management settings
  • Instagram connection (if applicable)

Part of the Square Setup Package

Basic Facebook page setup is included when you book our Newcastle Restaurant Square Setup. We ensure your ordering link, hours, and contact details are consistent across Square, Google, and Facebook.

View the Full Square Setup Package
